chumicro_compat.description: Cross-runtime compatibility polyfills for CircuitPython, MicroPython, and CPython — functools.partial and more.

chumicro_config.description: Standardized runtime-config helpers for ChuMicro libraries — section loader + on-device runtime-config reader.

chumicro_http_server.description: Non-blocking HTTP/1.1 server for CircuitPython, MicroPython, and CPython.

chumicro_kvstore.description: Tiny mutable key-value store for persisted runtime state — counters, timestamps, tokens — across CircuitPython, MicroPython, and CPython.

chumicro_mqtt.description: Non-blocking MQTT 3.1.1 client (QoS 0+1) for CircuitPython, MicroPython, and CPython.

chumicro_msgpack.description: Compact MessagePack serialization for CircuitPython, MicroPython, and CPython — delegates to the native C module when available.

chumicro_ntp.description: Runner-shaped SNTP client over an injected UDP socket — pure-Python, cross-runtime.

chumicro_requests.description: Non-blocking HTTP/1.1 client for CircuitPython, MicroPython, and CPython.

chumicro_runner.description: Tick-based task runner for CircuitPython, MicroPython, and CPython — non-blocking check/handle scheduling without async.

chumicro_sockets.description: Cross-runtime TCP + TLS sockets for CircuitPython, MicroPython, and CPython.

chumicro_timing.description: Wraparound-safe millisecond tick helpers plus wait value objects (deadlines, rates, signals) for CircuitPython, MicroPython, and CPython.

chumicro_websockets.description: Non-blocking WebSocket (RFC 6455) client + server for CircuitPython, MicroPython, and CPython

chumicro_wifi.description: Unified wifi supervisor across CircuitPython, MicroPython, and CPython — sole-supervisor model with reconnect, state machine, and per-runtime adapters.
